dialog.stepLabel: Wenshu: "See? How lively! You really need to come and see it in perso..."

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: See? How lively! You really need to come and see it in person for the full effect.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: And that's thanks to your efforts, Wenshu.

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: Well, I'm just doing my job. I should be the one thanking you. After all, without the Midnight Rangers tirelessly guarding the front lines, the <ano=sports games>Riverside Games</ano> wouldn't be possible.

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: Don't always be so tense. Sometimes, you have to give yourself a breather. It's not good to push yourself too hard. So, how about picking up an event to participate in?

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Wenshu... Thank you, but you don't have to pitch me.

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: Why not? Go enjoy your youth! I would've rushed to sign up if I was still young.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: {PlayerName}, it's good to see you here.

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: Oh! I guess you must be the Rover?

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: Nice to meet you! I'm the director of the Riverside Games. You can call me Wenshu.

options.text: Thank you for the invite, Wenshu.

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: Ah, I almost dropped the ball on this one. I would've forgotten to send out those invitations without Jiyan's reminder.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: It's not worth mentioning, Wenshu. This is the first Riverside Games in many years, and you must have been busy with various matters. I only offered a little help when I could.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: {PlayerName}, it's a slow day today. Please, take a break and have some fun.

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: That's right. Go participate in the event, you two! That's how you enjoy your day off!

options.text: You mean I can participate too?

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: Of course! The Jinzhou Riverside Games is an event for all people to enjoy.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Indeed. I'm looking forward to your performance, {PlayerName}.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Only a few events specifically require participants to be Resonators. Other than that, there are no special restrictions for any event.

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: We haven't held the Riverside Games in years. Look at him, Jiyan still remembers the rules better than I do. Who would've thought?

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: During the preparation, I came across some pictures from past Games and instantly felt a rush of adrenaline. Ah, the memories of my youth...

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: It's a pity that the Midnight Rangers are always on the front lines, getting ready for emergencies. The Riverside Games is their only chance to relax and have some fun.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: {PlayerName}, I suggest looking around for events to join if you're interested. Many of them are open to on-site registration.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Now, if you'll excuse me, I need to confirm the safety of the surroundings before the race begins. You can consult Wenshu should you need any assistance.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Have a great time, {PlayerName}.

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: Oh well, I didn't invite him over for that. I hoped he'd come and relax, not to find a new place to work.

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: On the other hand, we couldn't have brought the situation at the borders under control without Jiyan's prudence...

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: Sorry, I'm getting off track. The Gulpuff Relay is about to start, and I have to go to the scene in case anything happens.

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: Especially those still warming up in the backup lane. Gotta bring them over.

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: {PlayerName}, are you coming with me?

dialog.stepLabel: Troubled Midnight Ranger: "Ugh... All those hours of training for nothing. We're doomed..."

items.speaker: Troubled Midnight Ranger
items.text: Ugh... All those hours of training for nothing. We're doomed.

items.speaker: Calm Midnight Ranger
items.text: Don't give up yet. We've still got some time before the relay starts!

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: Lingyan, Ganquan, what's wrong?

items.speaker: Lingyan
items.text: Hi, Wenshu! And this is...?

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: This is {PlayerName}.

items.speaker: Lingyan
items.text: Perfect timing! We're have a bit of a situation right now.

items.speaker: Lingyan
items.text: Two of our teammates accidentally injured themselves during warm-up... Luckily, the wounds weren't too bad, but the doctor said that they wouldn't be able to participate in the relay anytime soon.

items.speaker: Lingyan
items.text: We've asked the organizing committee. Said we can still participate with temporary teammates.

items.speaker: Ganquan
items.text: But the relay is starting soon. It's impossible to find another person to join us, not to mention two...

items.speaker: Ganquan
items.text: Sigh... First our captain had to quit because of some family emergency, and now this...

items.speaker: Ganquan
items.text: Ugh. Are we supposed to just wait for the next Riverside Games? Who knows when that will be...

items.speaker: Lingyan
items.text: Speaking of which... Do you have a team, {PlayerName}?

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: {PlayerName} is also a Resonator. {Male=He's;Female=She's} fully qualified for the Gulpuff Relay.

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: Still... it depends on whether {Male=he;Female=she} would like to join you.

options.text: What kind of competition is it, then?

items.speaker: Lingyan
items.text: It's simple! Four people take turns controlling a Gulpuff in a relay race. The first team to reach the finish line wins.

options.text: What can I get out of this?

items.speaker: Lingyan
items.text: Thank you so much! If we can get the prize money, we'll definitely split it with you!

items.speaker: Lingyan
items.text: Even if we don't rank, we'll treat you to a big feast in Jinzhou to thank you for doing us such a big favor.

items.speaker: Ganquan
items.text: That's right! We'll buy you the best barbecue in Jinzhou. That place is everyone's favorite!

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: Then you're only one person short for the relay. I know a good candidate for that...

options.text: Is it the person I'm thinking of?

items.speaker: Ganquan
items.text: Wh-who?

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: Bingo.

items.speaker: Lingyan
items.text: Oh! Why didn't I think of him!

items.speaker: Ganquan
items.text: Huh? Are you serious? The general doesn't look like he'd be interested in events like this.

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: Well, there's more to your general than you know. That's all I can say.

items.speaker: Lingyan
items.text: What do you mean?

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: Instead of asking questions here, why don't you just go and invite him?

items.speaker: Ganquan
items.text: I don't have the guts...

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: Go invite him now, and you may still have a chance to get him onboard. Don't let others take your chance!

items.speaker: Lingyan
items.text: We're counting on you, {PlayerName}!

dialog.stepLabel: Ganquan: "You... You managed to rope the general in?..."

items.speaker: Ganquan
items.text: You... You managed to rope the general in?

items.speaker: Lingyan
items.text: Greetings, General Jiyan, {PlayerName}.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: {PlayerName} has told me what happened. I will join you.

items.speaker: Ganquan
items.text: Hooray! Now we can join the race! With General Jiyan and {PlayerName} on our side, maybe we can even aim for a new record!

items.speaker: Lingyan
items.text: Not to be the party pooper here, but as a last-minute team, we probably won't hit the record. Unless...

items.speaker: Ganquan
items.text: Unless what?

items.speaker: Lingyan
items.text: Uh, sorry, forget about it.

items.speaker: Lingyan
items.text: Ten years ago, a team set the record in the Gulpuff Relay race. That record remains unbeaten to this day.

items.speaker: Lingyan
items.text: Since then, every time the Games are held, a major highlight is whether the record will be broken.

items.speaker: Ganquan
items.text: Yeah! I really wanted to learn from their strategy, but the video of that race got borrowed and never returned. Bummer.

items.speaker: Lingyan
items.text: They set the record. They must have trained together for a long time.

items.speaker: Lingyan
items.text: Well we're a temporary team. Wouldn't have been able to learn much from it anyway.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Keep your chin up. Your hard work will pay off.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Not to mention the team you were talking about was a temporary team, too.

items.speaker: Ganquan
items.text: Wow, so even General Jiyan has heard of that race!

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Yes. That was a... good race.

items.speaker: Lingyan
items.text: Well, it's been ten years... I wonder how that team's doing now.

items.speaker: Ganquan
items.text: We should worry about ourselves first... There's not much time left, and we haven't even decided the relay order.

items.speaker: Lingyan
items.text: Ah, the relay order... It used to be decided by the captain...

items.speaker: Lingyan
items.text: Then... General, can you decide it for us?

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: As you have trained together extensively, I trust you can decide the order better than me. I will gladly cooperate to the best of my abilities.

items.speaker: Lingyan
items.text: Alright... in that case, I think Ganquan would be perfect as the first runner!

items.speaker: Ganquan
items.text: Me... the first? Seriously?

items.speaker: Lingyan
items.text: You've always been the first runner during our training. Surely you'll make a good start!

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: The first runner doesn't need to coordinate with the two of us; he only needs to exchange the controller with Lingyan. It's a safe arrangement indeed.

items.speaker: Ganquan
items.text: Whew—I'll do my best.

items.speaker: Lingyan
items.text: Hmm... As for General Jiyan and {PlayerName}, I think...

items.speaker: Lingyan
items.text: General, can you be the connecting third runner? Since you're familiar with both {PlayerName} and us Midnight Rangers.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: A reasonable strategy. I agree.

items.speaker: Ganquan
items.text: Then the relay order would be me first, followed by Lingyan, then General Jiyan, and {PlayerName} last.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: {PlayerName}, this is your first race, and you may receive plenty of attention as the last runner. Please stay calm and relax.

options.text: Butterflies are fighting in my stomach.
Prepare to be surprised when I win the race.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: I'm glad to hear that.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Once I arrive at the exchange zone, go for the goal and don't look back. I'll take care of the rest.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: I've always trusted your capabilities.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Any other questions?

items.speaker: Ganquan
items.text: Yes!

items.speaker: Ganquan
items.text: Our team doesn't have a name yet!

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Since {PlayerName} brought this team together, maybe we should let {Male=him;Female=her} decide the name.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Good, it sounds easy to remember.

items.speaker: Ganquan
items.text: I'm starting to crave some buffalo wings too...

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Not bad. It helps to release the tension.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: We can have this as the team name, though I wouldn't call myself a genius.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Considering your character, I was expecting something... different.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Nevertheless, it is a good name. I have no objection.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: The name is settled, then. Everyone, please get ready in your designated exchange zones.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: We can stay in touch with our Terminals once the race begins.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: {PlayerName}, are you all right?

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: I'm sorry for what just happened. You almost reached the finish line, and then...

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: {PlayerName}, did you notice anything unusual before?

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: An unfamiliar voice briefly interrupted our team's channel...

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Wenshu, let's evacuate the spectators now. Send them back to the city in batches.

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: I understand, but most of the teams are waiting to start their race, and it's our first Riverside Games in years. Ending it early may spoil their fun.

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: The voice you mentioned... Could it be our spectators cheering?

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: When {PlayerName} asked me to team up with {Male=him;Female=her}, I heard something similar by the racing lane.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: I have requested the monitoring data records of all nearby waterways from the Academy for safety measures.

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: I see. I thought the Gulpuffs were just frightened...

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: There might be an underlying cause of this unusual behavior.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: The records will take some more time to download. Evacuate the people first.

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: I trust your decision, but...

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: A man somehow ended up riding a Gulpuff when it all happened, and he seemed to really enjoy it. Now, other people are eager to give it a try too...

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: They all seem super excited... I guess it will take some time to evacuate them.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Get that person to leave first, and the others should follow.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Wenshu, I'm going with you.

options.text: Anything I can help you with?

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: Of course! Rover, you are respected by many. If you're willing to help us calm people down, it will making things easier for sure.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Thank you.

dialog.stepLabel: Wenshu: "Sir, please calm down and stop talking about riding Gulpuffs..."

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: Sir, please calm down and stop talking about riding Gulpuffs.

items.speaker: Excited Audience
items.text: But that was really fun!

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: May I have your hand?

items.speaker: Excited Audience
items.text: What... What's wrong?

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Nothing major. I just need to confirm something.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: As I expected.

items.speaker: Excited Audience
items.text: Huh? When did I get hurt? I didn't feel it at all.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: The adrenaline from excitement may have dampened your sensitivity to pain.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: However, your nervous response betrays your condition. You right hand has been shaking involuntarily, likely because the wound has been left untreated.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Fortunately, it's not caused by the Gulpuffs. Please take this to relieve the pain for now.

items.speaker: Excited Audience
items.text: Ouch... It's really starting to hurt now that you've mentioned it.

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: Alright. Have you calmed down now?

items.speaker: Excited Audience
items.text: I'm sorry. I got a little carried away... Sorry again for the trouble I've caused.

items.speaker: Wenshu
items.text: Let's go have someone see to your wound.

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: {PlayerName}, fancy seeing you here.

options.text: Jiyan and I are joining the relay race together.

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: I don't want to spoil your fun, but I'm afraid we need to suspend the race for now.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Can you fill us in on the data?

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: I checked the monitoring data as you asked, and I found unusual fluctuations near the upper waters to the north.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Why didn't the nearest Beacon pick up on this anomaly?

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: The Resonance Beacon is functioning properly, but we still don't know why it didn't issue a warning this time. I will investigate this further at a later time.

options.text: Is it related to the Gulpuffs' strange behaviors?

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: Animals are often the first to detect signs of danger.

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: Tacet Discords are similar to animals in this regard. They're very sensitive to any change in the frequencies in their surroundings. That's why those Gulpuffs went haywire.

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: I suppose that's why you asked me to check the monitoring data for you, Jiyan?

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Yes.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: The timing of this change is concerning. Why did it happen precisely during the Riverside Games?

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: Perhaps the Riverside Games' frequency resonated with something in the upper waters?

options.text: Let's go check out the upper waters now.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Yes. Let's go.

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: The lack of perceivable warning signs typically suggests unknown risks. Jiyan, {PlayerName}, stay safe.

dialog.stepLabel: Jiyan: "{PlayerName}, what are you doing here? Have you found any ev..."

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: {PlayerName}, what are you doing here? Have you found any event that you're interested in?

options.text: Yes, but I've run into a bit of trouble.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Trouble? If you're comfortable sharing, tell me about it. Maybe I can help.

options.text: Actually, I do need your help.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: So... you want me to join the relay as your temporary teammate?

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: No worries.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: No.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: The key to winning a relay race lies in mutual understanding, cooperation, and trust among team members.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Most of the teams are formed according to the Midnight Rangers units they belong to. Therefore, they're familiar with their teammates and have good teamwork.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: I believe you can find a better candidate for your team. That candidate doesn't have to be me.

options.text: But we'll be disqualified without another teammate.
I really want to join the race with you.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Disqualification for teams without enough participants... Yes, I remember that rule. I imagine your teammates would be greatly disappointed if that happened.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Joining you... I see. It might be fun.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: But given we never trained together before, it may prove challenging to win.

options.text: Doesn't matter, we're a last-minute temporary team anyway.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: A temporary team...

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: I'm fine, thank you for asking... It's been a long time since I last heard that phrase.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Indeed. No need to worry about the end result before the competition begins.

options.text: The team would be thrilled to have you.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Yes... I'll join you.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Spectators are gathering along the lanes. The race should start soon.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Let's go join our new teammates.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Nothing... Perhaps it's just my imagination.
